articles.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
articles.summary: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

articles.title: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
articles.summary: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.

articles.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
articles.summary: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.

articles.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
articles.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.

articles.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
articles.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

articles.title: Biodefense in the Intelligence Age
articles.summary: An action plan for AI-powered biological resilience
